text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kpler, a market intelligence and data analytics firm specializing in commodity flows, primarily energy, commented on today's news about the Strait of Hormuz: Strait open, reality constrained Announcements from Iran and the United States point to a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, yet operational realities tell a different story. Vessel movement remains confined to controlled corridors requiring approval, limiting throughput and raising compliance and reputational concerns. At the same time, the US naval posture continues to restrict Iranian exports. Markets have responded with cautious optimism, reflected in a short term pullback in prices, but underlying supply dynamics remain tight. Any meaningful recovery in flows depends on a gradual return of shipowners, beginning with a tentative “first movers” phase that may restore only a fraction of capacity. A full normalisation in trade and confidence is likely to take months, not weeks. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 专注于大宗商品流向（主要是能源）的市场情报与数据分析公司 Kpler 对今天有关霍尔木兹海峡的新闻评论道：海峡开放，现实受限。伊朗和美国发布的公告指向霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放，但运营现实却讲述了另一个故事。船舶航行仍局限于需要批准的受控走廊内，这限制了吞吐量，并引发了合规和声誉方面的担忧。与此同时，美国的军事部署继续限制伊朗的出口。市场以谨慎乐观的态度作出了回应，反映在价格的短期回落上，但潜在的供应动态依然紧张。任何有意义的流量恢复都取决于船东的逐步回归，从试探性的“先行者”阶段开始，该阶段可能只能恢复一小部分运力。贸易和信心的全面正常化可能需要数月而非数周时间。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kpler: Ship traffic in the Strait of Hormuz remains limited. Kpler reports traffic is still restricted to approval-only corridors as of Friday evening, hours after the US–Iran announced full reopening. Markets show “cautious optimism,” but supply remains tight and full normalization will take months, not weeks.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Kpler：霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通仍然有限。Kpler 报告称，截至周五晚上，即美伊宣布全面重新开放数小时后，交通仍仅限于需要批准的走廊。市场表现出“谨慎乐观”，但供应依然紧张，全面正常化将需要数月而非数周时间。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 At least 4 people were killed after a tornado struck Lena, Illinois earlier today. @wfwitness

text: 🇧🇫 British media finally got to Burkina Faso, and the answers weren't what they were looking for. Ibrahim Traore, president and leader of the revolution, sat down with Sky News. The journalist came loaded with gotcha questions. He had no problem answering them. On Russian support he said: "Indeed, Russian President Vladimir Putin wanted to provide us with all the necessary resources to fight terrorism, including military personnel. But I have always said: we are Burkina Faso. No one will come to fight for us, and that is a non-negotiable principle." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇫 英国媒体终于抵达了布基纳法索，但得到的答案并非他们所预期的。革命领导人兼总统易卜拉欣·特拉奥雷（Ibrahim Traore）接受了天空新闻台（Sky News）的采访。记者带着一连串刁钻的问题而来，但他毫无压力地一一作答。在谈到俄罗斯的支持时，他说：“确实，俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京希望为我们提供打击恐怖主义所需的一切资源，包括军事人员。但我一直说：我们是布基纳法索。没有人会来为我们而战，这是一个不可谈判的原则。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇧🇫 Burkina Faso armed forces killed around 100 militants in a combined air and ground operation near Arbinda in the Sahel region. The operation began with precision airstrikes on militant positions some 20 kilometers northeast of Arbinda, followed by a ground sweep. Around 100 fighters were killed in the assault. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇧🇫 布基纳法索武装部队在萨赫勒地区阿尔宾达（Arbinda）附近的一次空地联合行动中击毙了约 100 名武装分子。行动始于对阿尔宾达东北约 20 公里处武装分子阵地的精确空袭，随后进行了地面清剿。此次袭击共击毙约 100 名武装人员。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf sends response to Donald Trump: 1- The President of the United States made seven claims in one hour, all seven of which were false. 2- They did not win the war with these lies, and they will certainly not get anywhere in negotiations either. 3- With the continuation of the blockade, the Strait of Hormuz will not remain open. 4- Passage through the Strait of Hormuz will be conducted based on the "designated route" and with "Iranian authorization." 5- Whether the Strait is open or closed and the regulations governing it will be determined by the field, not by social media. 6- Media warfare and engineering public opinion are an important part of war, and the Iranian nation is not affected by these tricks. Read the real and accurate news of the negotiations in the recent interview of the Foreign Ministry spokesman. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）回应唐纳德·特朗普：1- 美国总统在一小时内提出了七项主张，这七项全部是虚假的。2- 他们没有用这些谎言赢得战争，在谈判中也肯定不会有任何进展。3- 如果封锁继续，霍尔木兹海峡将不会保持开放。4- 通过霍尔木兹海峡的通行将基于“指定航线”并经“伊朗授权”进行。5- 海峡是开放还是关闭以及管理它的规则将由实地情况决定，而不是由社交媒体决定。6- 媒体战和操纵舆论是战争的重要组成部分，伊朗民族不会受到这些伎俩的影响。请阅读外交部发言人最近采访中关于谈判的真实准确新闻。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The speaker of the Iranian parliament says the Strait of Hormuz won't be open as long as the US blockade continues. ۱- رئیس جمهور آمریکا در یک ساعت هفت ادعا مطرح کرد که هر هفت ادعا کذب است. ۲- با این دروغگویی‌ها در جنگ پیروز نشدند و حتما در مذاکره هم راه به جایی نخواهند برد. ۳- با ادامهٔ محاصره، تنگهٔ هرمز باز نخواهد ماند. - محمدباقر قالیباف | MB Ghalibaf tweet

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @LucasFoxNews : Iranian official: “only commercial vessels with authorization from the IRGC Navy are permitted to navigate through designated routes after paying the required tolls.” The time has come to comply with the new Maritime Regime of the Strait of Hormuz. These regulations are determined by Iran, not by social media posts! Under this new system, only commercial vessels with authorization from the IRGC Navy are permitted to navigate through designated routes after paying the required tolls. If the U.S. attempts to create any disturbance for Iranian ships, this situation can easily be changed. - ابراهیم عزیزی tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) RT @LucasFoxNews : 伊朗官员：“只有获得伊斯兰革命卫队海军授权的商船，在支付所需通行费后，才被允许通过指定航线航行。” 现在是遵守霍尔木兹海峡新海事制度的时候了。这些规定由伊朗决定，而不是由社交媒体帖子决定！根据这个新系统，只有获得伊斯兰革命卫队海军授权的商船，在支付所需通行费后，才被允许通过指定航线航行。如果美国试图对伊朗船只制造任何干扰，这种情况很容易改变。- 易卜拉欣·阿齐兹 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iran’s parliament speaker says that the Strait of Hormuz will not remain open until the US blockade is lifted, ships that want to pass through must still get IRGC permission. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045269539286351914/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗议会议长表示，在解除美国封锁之前，霍尔木兹海峡不会保持开放，想要通过的船只仍必须获得伊斯兰革命卫队的许可。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045269539286351914/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "I ended 8 wars, and maybe a little early to say this but if we add Iran and Lebanon, that will be 10 wars ended. Think of how many lives we've saved." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045269421564846207/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“我结束了8场战争，也许现在说还为时过早，但如果我们加上伊朗和黎巴嫩，那就是结束了10场战争。想想我们挽救了多少生命。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045269421564846207/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump: "In South Africa there's a very horrible thing going on in South Africa, it's a genocide, it's a horrible thing... they kill people if they're white." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045268878998073697/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普：“在南非发生了一件非常可怕的事情，那是种族灭绝，这是一件可怕的事情……如果他们是白人，他们就会杀人。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045268878998073697/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump says very soon the "great strength" of the American military will create "a new dawn for Cuba." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045267596841247215/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普说，美国军队的“强大力量”很快就会为古巴创造“新的曙光”。 https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045267596841247215/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | President Trump on NATO allies: Now that the Hormuz Strait situation is almost over, I received a call from NATO asking if we would like some help. And I told them I would have liked your help two months ago, but now I really don't want your help anymore. Because they were absolutely useless when we needed them. But actually, we never needed them. They needed us. They need us so badly. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 快讯 | 特朗普总统谈北约盟国：既然霍尔木兹海峡的情况快结束了，我接到了北约的电话，问我们是否需要帮助。我告诉他们，我两个月前会需要你们的帮助，但现在，我真的不再需要你们的帮助了。因为当我们需要他们时，他们完全没用。但实际上，我们从不需要他们。他们需要我们。他们非常需要我们。查看我们的最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran's Speaker of Parliament and key part of negotiating team Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf says that Trump 'made seven claims in one hour, all seven of which were false'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗议会议长兼谈判团队关键成员穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示，特朗普“在一小时内提出了七项主张，这七项主张全是谎言”。推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran has denied two of President Trump's key claims today. Tehran denied agreeing to the transfer of enriched uranium out of the country, and said it would continue to limit number of ships crossing through the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗今天否认了特朗普总统的两项关键主张。德黑兰否认同意将浓缩铀转移出该国，并表示将继续限制通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只数量。推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says he would like to thank Pakistan and 'its great prime minister and its great, great field marshal' for their contributions to US-Iran deal. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普表示，他要感谢巴基斯坦及其“伟大的总理和伟大的陆军元帅”为美伊协议所做的贡献。推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that NATO was 'absolutely useless when we needed them'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普表示，北约在“我们需要他们时完全没用”。推文

text: Faytuks News RT @Osinttechnical : @MarineTraffic Mass turn around, nearly every ship attempting the crossing has turned back. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045215990632362430/video/1 tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇺🇸U.S. President Trump criticized NATO's lack of support during the conflict with Iran. "And now that the Hormuz Strait situation is almost over, I received a call from NATO asking if we would like some help. Thank you very much, NATO. And I told…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 U.S. President Trump promised to make Lebanon great again. "Our deal with Iran is not in any way tied to Lebanon, but we will make Lebanon great again. I mean, it's about time we get some we've we've sort of the world has forgotten them, and they're good people." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇺🇸美国总统特朗普批评北约在与伊朗的冲突中缺乏支持。“既然霍尔木兹海峡的情况快结束了，我接到了北约的电话，问我们是否需要帮助。非常感谢，北约。我告诉……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 美国总统特朗普承诺让黎巴嫩再次伟大。“我们与伊朗的协议与黎巴嫩没有任何关系，但我们将让黎巴嫩再次伟大。我的意思是，是时候让我们……世界已经遗忘了他们，他们是好人。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷U.S. President Trump on the opening of the Strait of Hormuz: "This will be a great and brilliant day for the world because Iran has just announced that the Strait Of Hormuz is fully open and ready for business and full passage. But the naval blockade…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump criticized NATO's lack of support during the conflict with Iran. "And now that the Hormuz Strait situation is almost over, I received a call from NATO asking if we would like some help. Thank you very much, NATO. And I told them I would have liked your help two months ago, but now I really don't want your help anymore because they were absolutely useless when we needed them. But, actually, we never needed them. They needed us. They need us. They need us so badly." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷美国总统特朗普谈霍尔木兹海峡的开放：“这对世界来说将是伟大而辉煌的一天，因为伊朗刚刚宣布霍尔木兹海峡已完全开放，准备好进行商业活动和全面通行。但是海军封锁……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普批评北约在与伊朗的冲突中缺乏支持。“既然霍尔木兹海峡的情况快结束了，我接到了北约的电话，问我们是否需要帮助。我告诉他们，我两个月前会需要你们的帮助，但现在，我真的不再需要你们的帮助了，因为当我们需要他们时，他们完全没用。但实际上，我们从不需要他们。他们需要我们。他们需要我们。他们非常需要我们。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: I directed Pete Hegseth to begin releasing government files relating to UFOs and unexplained aerial phenomena. We found many interesting documents.
text_zh: 特朗普：我指示皮特·海格塞斯开始发布与UFO和不明空中现象有关的政府文件。我们发现了很多有趣的文件。
